name: autodev

references.topic: executable spec: contract-bounded unattended loop, manages-not-replaces evolve/rpi, loop-discipline-under-autonomy (soc-qk4b)
executable spec: ao autodev CLI command behavior, linked to cmd tests (soc-jnfgi)

output_contract: A validated PROGRAM.md/AUTODEV.md contract or a clear evolve/RPI execution handoff. /autodev defines and validates the repo-local operational contract (Objective, Mutable Scope, Immutable Scope, Experiment Unit, Validation Commands, Decision Policy, Escalation Rules, Stop Conditions) that the operating loop reads each tick via ao autodev — it does NOT run the loop. PROGRAM.md takes precedence over AUTODEV.md; the drivers (evolve, Factory) consume the contract and run the loop.

sources: skills/autodev/SKILL.md (verified: ao autodev init/validate --json --file; PROGRAM.md > AUTODEV.md precedence; 8 required contract sections)
docs/architecture/operating-loop.md — the config/intent layer read each tick (not a loop itself)
Routing: autodev defines the loop contract; evolve runs the loop; rpi runs one bounded lifecycle
